title: Warm Dutch Rice Fried Rice
description: A salty and bouncy festive Dutch dish made with unsalted butter and featuring a fry-grind-rice-khao-khua method, this vegan-friendly recipe is perfect for any meal.
instructions: Heat the melted butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, until fragrant.
Add the grated carrot and cook for 2 minutes, until it starts to soften.
Add the frozen peas and cook until they are thawed and heated through.
Add the cooked and cooled rice to the skillet, breaking up any clumps with a spatula.
Stir in the soy sauce, salt, and black pepper, and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the rice is well coated.
Use a spatula to scrape the bottom of the skillet and mix the ingredients well.
Transfer the fried rice to a serving platter and serve hot.
